events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need reason. Scenario: venting refrigerant (EPA 609 violation). Work rough-complete. Need decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high or critical? Venting refrigerant is environmental violation, ozone depletion, potential health hazard. In trade benchmark, likely critical? Let's assess. EPA Section 609 prohibits venting refrigerant during service of motor vehicle air conditioners. Violation. Component condition: installed-defective? The observed condition is venting refrigerant, component may be leaking or service valve improperly connected. Also non-compliant due to EPA violation. So component_conditions include installed-defective and non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 80. Value not asked, 0. Sound_source etc default empty? Schema says string for sound_source, number for event_time, rate. We can set sound_source: "", event_time:0, rate:0. Order empty list. Workable empty list. Findings: "Refrigerant being vented to atmosphere during A/C service", "Violation of EPA Section 609 prohibition on refrigerant venting". Actions: "Stop venting immediately", "Recover refrigerant using certified recovery equipment", "Inspect hoses/fittings/service valves for leaks and repair", "Recharge to OEM specifications with proper leak test", "Document refrigerant quantities and disposal records". References: "EPA Section 609 (40 CFR Part 82 Subpart B)", "OEM A/C service specifications". Confidence 1.0. Rationale brief. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
